description: Research short-term rental content market - competitive analysis

marketOverview.marketMaturity: Highly saturated - one of the most competitive niches
marketOverview.keyInsight: Most shows focus on investment/acquisition; few focus on operations/management

topCompetitors.name: Get Paid For Your Pad
topCompetitors.hosts: Jasper Ribbers, Eric Moeller, Kaye Putnam
topCompetitors.focus: Pricing strategies, revenue management, direct bookings
topCompetitors.differentiation: Best-selling book author, industry veteran since 2014

topCompetitors.name: Vacation Rental Success
topCompetitors.focus: Marketing, branding, interior design, guest satisfaction
topCompetitors.differentiation: Former CEO of rental agency, 10+ years experience

topCompetitors.name: The Short Term Show
topCompetitors.differentiation: Millionaire in equity in 3 years, investor focus

topCompetitors.name: Short Term Rental Management
topCompetitors.differentiation: 4000+ stays experience, longest-running Airbnb in Smokies

topCompetitors.name: Short Term Rental Secrets
topCompetitors.focus: Launch, automate, scale for financial freedom

contentGaps: Regulatory compliance and legal issues (rapidly changing)
Direct booking growth for small operators

audienceDemographics.primary: Aspiring and current STR hosts, real estate investors
audienceDemographics.listeningBehavior: Want actionable, specific strategies; tired of generic advice

strategicAssessment.barrierToEntry: HIGH - Need unique angle or significant expertise
strategicAssessment.contentVelocity: MEDIUM - Evergreen content works, but regulatory changes require updates
strategicAssessment.monetizationPotential: HIGH - Industry has money, hosts invest in tools/services
strategicAssessment.jaynaAdvantage: Built cabin business from scratch, knows maintenance systems, regulatory experience
strategicAssessment.recommendation: Only pursue if combined with unique angle (cabin niche + maintenance systems) OR as secondary content pillar
